title: Luke Kennard
extract: Luke Douglas Kennard ( kə-NARD; born June 24, 1996) is an American professional basketball player for the Los Angeles Lakers of the National Basketball Association (NBA). He played college basketball for the Duke Blue Devils and was drafted by the Detroit Pistons with the 12th pick in the 2017 NBA draft. He has also played for the Los Angeles Clippers, Memphis Grizzlies, and Atlanta Hawks. His .4421 three-point field goal percentage currently ranks second in NBA history and first amongst active players.
